name: Atomics
notes: Minimal global support added to keep the compiled scripts/release.js canary runnable under JROC. Only Atomics.wait(...) is currently exposed, and it is implemented as a blocking timeout sleep suitable for the release-script polling path rather than full shared-memory synchronization semantics.

apis.name: wait(typedArray, index, value, timeout)
apis.notes: Currently supports the release canary shape with Int32Array views backed by SharedArrayBuffer and returns `"not-equal"` or `"timed-out"`. Does not yet implement full ECMAScript shared-memory wait/notify behavior.
